query: SELECT users.id, users.openId, COUNT(investments.id) as investment_count FROM users LEFT JOIN investments ON users.id = investments.userId GROUP BY users.id, users.openId ORDER BY users.id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Aq7fuRAAT7oF4P.root --database GhERUjFNHAWX9pobhR6F3B --execute SELECT users.id, users.openId, COUNT(investments.id) as investment_count FROM users LEFT JOIN investments ON users.id = investments.userId GROUP BY users.id, users.openId ORDER BY users.id DESC LIMIT 5;
